title: activity — OpenTelemetry metrics
description: OpenTelemetry / Prometheus metrics this module emits. RED pattern for the write hot-path (every LogsActivity fire); RED-adjacent for the feed read path; volume + retention counters for capacity planning + audit-adjacent volume reports.

metrics.name: academorix.activity.recorded.total
metrics.description: Increments on every ActivityRecorded event. Primary write-volume signal — drives capacity planning + tenant-quota transparency.

metrics.name: academorix.activity.write.duration_ms
metrics.description: LogsActivity trait fire latency. Every domain write pays this cost as tail latency. P95 target < 25ms. outcome: written | skipped | error.

metrics.name: academorix.activity.write.errors.total
metrics.description: LogsActivity trait fire that raised. Should be zero — activity writes must be fail-soft (log + swallow, never re-raise into the domain write path).

metrics.name: academorix.activity.batch.size
metrics.description: Activities per batch. High values suggest bulk-write use cases that should probably route through a dedicated batch API instead of individual mutations.

metrics.name: academorix.activity.batch.orphaned.total
metrics.description: Batches with no matching ActivityBatchCompleted after the reconciliation window. Fed by ReconcileActivityBatchesJob. Should be low (< 1% of started batches).

metrics.name: academorix.activity.feed.reads.total
metrics.description: Feed endpoint request count. endpoint: list | show | by-entity | by-user | mine | feed.

metrics.name: academorix.activity.feed.duration_ms
metrics.description: Feed endpoint response time. P95 target < 250ms for list; < 100ms for show.

metrics.name: academorix.activity.broadcast.sent.total
metrics.description: Broadcast dispatches. channel_kind: tenant | user | batch_collapsed.

metrics.name: academorix.activity.broadcast.suppressed.total
metrics.description: Broadcasts suppressed. reason: not_entitled | log_name_disabled | duplicate_cursor_hit | reverb_unreachable.

metrics.name: academorix.activity.purge.rows_deleted.total
metrics.description: Rows deleted by PurgeExpiredActivitiesJob. Feeds retention transparency + capacity planning.

metrics.name: academorix.activity.purge.duration_ms
metrics.description: PurgeExpiredActivitiesJob end-to-end duration. Bimodal distribution — small tenants finish in seconds; large tenants take minutes.

metrics.name: academorix.activity.archive.rows_archived.total
metrics.description: Rows archived to cold storage by ArchiveActivitiesToColdStorageJob.

metrics.name: academorix.activity.retention.policies_active
metrics.description: Point-in-time count of active retention policies. retention_tier: standard (<= 90d) | extended (91..365d) | regulator_hold (> 365d). Sampled every 300s.

metrics.name: academorix.activity.backfill.rows_migrated.total
metrics.description: Rows updated by BackfillActivityTenantIdFromJsonbJob. Monotonically decreasing to zero as Wave-6 upgrade completes.

metrics.name: academorix.activity.backfill.orphans_detected.total
metrics.description: Rows where tenant_id remained NULL after backfill (properties.tenant_id also NULL). Fires the ACTIVITY_BACKFILL_ORPHAN_DETECTED alert. Should be zero.

metrics.name: academorix.activity.digest.emails_sent.total
metrics.description: Digest emails sent. cadence: daily | weekly.

metrics.name: academorix.activity.subject_permission.cache.hit_ratio
metrics.description: Cache hit ratio on the RBAC subject-permission check. SLO target: > 0.95 — the feed's read hot-path depends on this.
